name: Black Forest Cake # 4
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 6 ingredients in a mixing bowl. Stir until well mixed.
2. Add shortening, milk and vanilla. Beat mixture for 3 minutes at Low speed of electric mixer, scraping sides of bowl occasionally.
3. Grease 2 (9") round cake pans; line bottoms with waxed paper.
4. Pour batter into pans.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a wooden toothpick inserted in center comes out clean.
6. Cool in pans for 10 minutes; remove from pans and let cool completely on wire racks.
7. Split cake layers in half horizontally to make 4 layers.
8. Make fine crumbs using 1 cake layer; set crumbs aside.
9. Beat whipping cream until foamy. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating until soft peaks form.
10. Place 1 cake layer on a cake platter. Spread with 1 cup whipped cream and top with 3/4 cup cherry pie filling.
11. Repeat with 2nd layer, and then top with 3rd cake layer.
12. Frost sides and top with whipped cream, reserving a small amount for garnish.
13. Pat cake crumbs generously around sides of cake.
14. Spoon or pipe whipped cream around top of cake; spoon remaining pie filling on center of top.
15. Chill well.
NOTE: You can add several layers as required by baking more batter.
